title: A2UI (Agent to UI) Client-to-Server Event Schema
description: Describes a JSON payload for a client-to-server event message.

userAction.description: Reports a user-initiated action from a component. Optional fields deliveryMode, localDataModelUpdate, and openLink are implementation-layer extensions (see docs/local-client-dataModel-extension-v0_8.md); they are not required for a minimal client-to-server forwarder.

name.description: The name of the action, taken from the component's action.name property.

surfaceId.description: The id of the surface where the event originated.

sourceComponentId.description: The id of the component that triggered the event.

timestamp.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event occurred.

context.description: A JSON object containing the key-value pairs from the component's action.context, after resolving all data bindings.

deliveryMode.description: Implementation extension: "server" (default semantics: forward userAction only) or "local" (client may apply localDataModelUpdate before or without server round-trip).

localDataModelUpdate.description: Implementation extension: same shape as server-to-client dataModelUpdate (surfaceId, optional path, contents). May mirror Button.action.localDataModelUpdate for logging or transport.

openLink.description: Implementation extension: client-side navigation intent; mirrors Button.action.openLink (url, optional target).

url.description: Absolute or relative URL to open.

target.description: Browsing context name; default _blank for new tab.

error.description: Reports a client-side error. The content is flexible.
